component.detail: No pods Pending past grace period
No in-cluster etcd pods found in kube-system (external etcd or non-kubeadm install)

findings.message: ETCD probe is blind: no in-cluster etcd pods captured. Cluster may be using external etcd.
findings.remediation: For external etcd: install etcd-exporter on the etcd nodes and scrape via Prometheus. For kubeadm in-cluster etcd: confirm static-pod manifests in /etc/kubernetes/manifests/ on control-plane nodes.

component.detail: No pods stuck on volume mount

findings.message: HPA mcp-gateway/mcp-context-forge-hpa autoscaling inactive (reason=ScalingDisabled) — expected when the target is scaled to zero / KEDA scale-to-zero; not an outage
findings.remediation: kubectl describe hpa mcp-context-forge-hpa -n mcp-gateway — controller's last message: scaling is disabled since the replica count of the target is zero

kubectl describe hpa haproxy-hpa -n pg — controller's last message: the HPA was unable to compute the replica count: failed to get cpu utilization: missing request for cpu in container kanister-sidecar of Pod haproxy-589cbf7fb7-gzq4x

findings.message: HPA vc-tools/agentchat autoscaling inactive (reason=ScalingDisabled) — expected when the target is scaled to zero / KEDA scale-to-zero; not an outage

component.detail: k3s SQLite datastore (single-node); no etcd pods expected

findings.message: k3s cluster appears to use SQLite (single-node, no etcd static pods found); no HA for the datastore
findings.remediation: For production deployments, run at least 3 control-plane nodes to enable embedded etcd HA. See: https://host-e1352047/datastore/ha-embedded. To suppress this advisory on an intentional single-node install, set CHA_K3S_SINGLE_NODE_OK=true.
